Welcome

Welcome to Focular

This experiment starts the day after installation and lasts 14 days. Phase 1 logs ONLY visits to your Focal trigger sites for 7 days. Phase 2 enables the procrastination overlay for 7 days.

Phase 1
Logging only
Phase 2
Overlay enabled
Overlay turns on automatically.
Add at least 2 trigger sites before continuing
You can add or edit more later from the extension popup.
Optional: add your email
If you want us to contact you about the study, add an email address.

Focular

Choose where the popup appears. Game is fixed to Sudoku.

Experiment
Phase 1
Popup enabled
Turn all popup logic on or off.

Pages that should show the game overlay. Example: example.com

How long to wait before the popup appears.

Timer
--:--
Consent information

By selecting "I Consent", you agree to participate in this study and allow Focular to log limited usage data.

  • We log only time spent on websites that you add as trigger sites.
  • We do not log browsing activity for websites you did not add.
  • We do not collect page content, passwords, or text you type on websites.
  • If you choose to provide an email address, we store it with your participant ID.
  • You can edit your trigger sites at any time from the Focular extension popup.
